message:
feat(engine): add 271 enrichment integration tests across 5 more modules

Add enrichment integration test suites for:
- minimized_repro_extraction (53 tests): failure categories, repro
  reduction ratios, triage routing, extraction verdicts, serde
- module_async_evaluation (63 tests): async phases, suspension/resume,
  rejection propagation, topological ordering, finalization, serde
- module_compatibility_matrix (52 tests): feature/runtime enums,
  validation with waivers, observation evaluation, hash determinism
- module_index_parity_gate (54 tests): parity/cold-start verdicts,
  gate decisions, rollback/lockout, batch evaluation, receipts
- module_live_binding (49 tests): binding cell lifecycle, namespace
  objects, import wiring, live mutations, validation, serde

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
